parsermigration-edit-subtitle: iyadoo la adeegsanayo qalabka guurinta falanqeeyaha
parsermigration-pref-help: Tani waxay ku dartaa xiriir dhinaca ah oo siinaya marin loo maro [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Extension:ParserMigration qalab] lagu guuriyo qoraalka bogagga si loogu wareejiyo noocyada cusub ee falanqeeyaha MediaWiki.
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-select: Isticmaal falanqeeyaha Parsoid ee cusub ee wikitext-ka:
Marka Parsoid la isticmaalo, xiriir dhinaca ayaa la siin doonaa si loo isticmaalo falanqeeye hore haddii ay dhibaato dhacdo.
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-always: Had iyo jeer (ikhtiyaar lagu soo biirayo)
parsermigration-parsoid-readviews-defaul: Sida ku xusan qaabeynta wiki-ga (caadi ahaan)
parsermigration-report-bug-toolbox-title: Haddii aad aragto khaladaad muuqaal ah, waxay sababi kartaa Parsoid
parsermigration-notice-body: Waxaad isticmaalaysaa falanqeeyaha cusub ee Parsoid si aad u muujiso boggan. [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Special:MyLanguage/Parsoid/Parser_Unification/Migration Wax badan ka baro astaantan].
parsermigration-reportbug-dialog-complet: Jawaabtaada waxaa lagu soo dhajiyay bogga [$2 $1].
parsermigration-reportbug-dialog-desc: Boggan waxaa lagu soo bandhigay [[mw:Special:MyLanguage/Parsoid|Parsoid]], taasoo laga yaabo inay sabab u tahay qaar ka mid ah khaladaadka muuqaalka.
parsermigration-reportbug-dialog-destina: Jawaab-celintaada waxaa lagu dari doonaa bogga [$2 $1], iyadoo lagu lifaaqayo magacaaga isticmaale.
parsermigration-reportbug-dialog-placeho: Sharax ciladda muuqaalka ee aad aragto
parsermigration-feedback-error1: Cilad: Natiijo aan la aqoonsan oo ka timid API-ga
parsermigration-feedback-error4: Cilad: Lama awoodin in jawaab celinta lagu diro cinwaanka la bixiyay
tag-parsermigration-visual-bug-descripti: Warbixin ku saabsan khalad muuqaal ah oo lagu sameeyay iyadoo la adeegsanayo [[mw:Extension:ParserMigration|Kordhinta Socdaalka Parser-ka]]
